concept: Warm, mission-focused editorial aesthetic evoking Arequipa (the 'White City'). Focus on sillar stone textures, volcanic landscapes, and Andean warmth. Generous spacing, intentional asymmetry, and no generic SaaS gradients.

hierarchy.h1_hero: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-light tracking-tighter leading-none

rules: Headings strictly use Cormorant Garamond for an elegant, rooted, and historic feel.
Never center paragraphs. Left-align dense text for readability.
Use Outfit for all interactive elements, body text, and small labels.
Pure #000000 and #FFFFFF are banned. Always use the off-white (Sillar) or charcoal (Volcanic).
Use Terracotta strictly for primary CTAs and active states.

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento Grid Mode A (Tetris Grid) for visual sections, emphasizing asymmetry and tension. Combine span-4 and span-8 items.
rules: Adopt generous spacing. Use 2x standard padding.
Containers with borders must use internal padding to prevent collision.
Prioritize optical alignment over geometric alignment.

motion_and_interactions.scrolling: Lenis for smooth scrolling, giving momentum and weight to the layout.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Slight lift (-translate-y-1) and subtle shadow addition for interactive cards. Explicitly define hover text colors.
motion_and_interactions.image_reveal: Use Framer Motion to softly fade and clip-path reveal images on scroll.

component_strategies.navigation: Sticky glassmorphism header (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FAFAF8]/70) with a delicate bottom border (border-[#2C2B29]/10).
component_strategies.hero: Full-bleed or massive rounded container. Image overlay must be bg-black/30 maximum, or a gradient fade from black/60 at the bottom to transparent at the top to ensure white text readability.
component_strategies.cards: Avoid standard drop-shadow cards. Use flat backgrounds (secondary or accent_container) with no borders, OR 1px subtle borders on primary background. No rounded corners greater than rounded-xl.
component_strategies.forms: Shadcn components heavily customized to remove the 'Vercel look'. Use square corners or slightly rounded (rounded-sm), warm grey borders, and Terracotta focus rings.
component_strategies.timeline: For itinerary: A vertical tracking line (border-l-2 border-terracotta/30) with terracotta dots for each day.
component_strategies.buttons: Primary: Solid Terracotta background, inverse text, square or slightly rounded. Hover: Darker terracotta. Secondary: Outline with charcoal text.

hero_bg.description: Stunning view of a mountain through a colonial arch, perfect for the main hero.

about_volcano.description: Dramatic view of El Misti Volcano.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text over images uses text-shadow or overlays to meet APCA contrast ratios.
accessibility_and_testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements (buttons, links, forms, inputs) MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case based on role (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button', data-testid='contact-form-submit').

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the landing page using the exact media URLs provided.
Do not use generic tech-bro gradients. Stick strictly to the Organic & Earthy palette.
Install and use Cormorant Garamond and Outfit from Google Fonts.
Ensure the contact form and prayer request sections use customized Shadcn form components, styled to match the warm Sillar/Terracotta theme.
For the About Arequipa section, use the Bento Grid Mode A layout to mix text blocks with the volcano, architecture, and textile images.
